description: A field surveyor made an instrument height error of exactly 1.52 meters on a subset of points during a topographic survey. Import the survey data from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\colorado_foothills_survey.csv' (Format: Point ID, Easting, Northing, Elevation, Code). Correct the elevation (Z) for point IDs 21, 22, 23, 24, and 25 by subtracting 1.52 meters. Export the complete set of survey points to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\corrected_points.txt'.
